tagged_types.name: File_Input
tagged_types.code: type File_Input is new Input_Source with private;

documentation.description: A special implementation of a reader, that reads from a file.

access_types.name: File_Input_Access
access_types.code: type File_Input_Access is access all File_Input'Class;

documentation.description: A special implementation of a reader, that reads from a file.
Close the file and free the memory
True if From is past the last character in the file.

subprograms.name: Next_Char

documentation.description: Return the next character in the file.

subprograms.name: Open
subprograms.code: procedure Open (Filename : String; Input : out File_Input)

documentation.description:
Open a new file for reading.
Note that the file is read completly at once, and saved in memory.
This provides a much better access later on, however this might be a
problem for very big files.
The physical file on disk can be modified at any time afterwards, since
it is no longer read.
This function can decode a file if it is coded in Utf8, Utf16 or Utf32
